Plaintiff Larry Pruitt'S Application For Order Requiring Production Of Expert Witnesses For Deposition Before The Expert Discovery Cut-Off Date
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Timothy F. Perry, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Larry Pruitt
Timothy A. Dolan, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Del Monte Electric Co. Inc.
Clark W. Patten, Esq., for other party: UCSF

After hearing, Plaintiff Larry Pruit's Motion To Compel Taking Of Expert Witness Depositions is granted as follows:
1- Deposition fo Dr. Sampson, Dr. Posin, Carol Hyland, and Deniel Girvan to proceed not later than 10/31/08.
2- Defendant Del Monte Electric to produce all working documents, referenced materials and a summary of Mr. Hinson's opinions and basis of opinions to plaintiff by 5:00 p.m. on 10/31/08.
3- Hinson's deposition to proceed not late than 11/6/08.
4- Defendant Del Monte Electric to bear the cotst of ex-pedited transcript of Hinson deposition, if one is requested. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
